zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Carew於從1420年到1430年出生在英國素瑞時，她的父親Thomas Carew41歲，母親Agnes Hayton92歲。她和William Saunders至少有3個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於1470年8月6日在英國素瑞哈列武德，埋葬在英國素瑞哈列武德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan Carew于从1420年到1430年出生在英国素瑞时，她的父亲Thomas Carew41岁，母亲Agnes Hayton92岁。她和William Saunders至少有3个儿子和1个女儿。她去世于1470年8月6日在英国素瑞哈列武德，埋葬在英国素瑞哈列武德。

nameMeanings.name: Carew
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Aileen, James Patrick, Kieran.

Welsh (Pembrokeshire): habitational name from any of various minor places in Wales, in particular one near Pembroke with a major castle, named from Welsh caer ‘fort’ + rhiw ‘hill, slope’. The surname was taken to Ireland soon after the Norman invasion of England and was Gaelicized as de Carrún. In the 16th century a family called Carew from Devon played an important part in establishing the Tudor administration in Ireland.
Cornish (Somerset and Devon): from the cognate Cornish word kerrow (plural of ker ‘fort’), which occurs seven times as a placename in Cornwall.

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Carew was born from 1420 to 1430, in Surrey, England, her father, Thomas Carew, was 41 and her mother, Agnes Hayton, was 92. She had at least 3 sons and 1 daughter with William Saunders. She died on 6 August 1470, in Charlwood, Surrey, England, and was buried in Charlwood, Surrey, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan Carew est née du 1420 au 1430, à Surrey, Angleterre, son père, Thomas Carew, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Agnes Hayton, avait 92 ans. Elle a eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille avec William Saunders. Elle est décédée le 6 août 1470, à Charlwood, Surrey, Angleterre, et a été enterrée à Charlwood, Surrey, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan Carew von 1420 bis 1430 in Surrey, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas Carew 41 und ihre Mutter Agnes Hayton 92. Sie hatte mit William Saunders mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 6. August 1470 in Charlwood, Surrey, England und wurde in Charlwood, Surrey, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Carew è nata il da 1420 a 1430 nel Surrey, England, sua padre, Thomas Carew, aveva 41 anni e sua madre, Agnes Hayton, aveva 92 anni. Lei avuto almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia con William Saunders. Morì il 6 agosto 1470, nel Charlwood, Surrey, England, e fu sepolta a Charlwood, Surrey, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan Carewがから1420年まで1430年にイギリススリーで生まれた時，父Thomas Carewは41歳，母Agnes Haytonは92歳であった。彼女はWilliam Saundersとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1470年8月6日にイギリススリーチャールウッドで死去し，イギリススリーチャールウッドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan Carew(이)가 1420년 부터 1430년 까지 영국 수리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Carew(은)는 41세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes Hayton(은)는 92세였다. 그녀는 William Saunders(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1470년 8월 6일 영국 수리 찰우드에서 사망했으며 영국 수리 찰우드에 묻혔다.

lv.From 1420 to 1430–6 August 1470: no 1420. gada līdz 1430. gadam–1470. gada 6. augusts

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Carew nasceu de 1420 a 1430, em Surrey, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas Carew, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Hayton, tinha 92 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha com William Saunders. Ela faleceu em 6 de agosto de 1470, em Charlwood, Surrey, Inglaterra, e foi sepultada em Charlwood, Surrey, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan Carew родилась с 1420 по 1430 в местности сурри, Англия, её отцу по имени Thomas Carew было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Agnes Hayton, 92. У неё было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь от William Saunders. Она умерла 6 августа 1470 г. в местности чарлвуд, сурри, Англия и была похоронена в местности чарлвуд, сурри, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joan Carew nació desde 1420 hasta 1430, en Surrey, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas Carew, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Agnes Hayton, tenía 92 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija con William Saunders. Murió el 6 de agosto de 1470, en Charlwood, Surrey, Inglaterra, y fue sepultada en Charlwood, Surrey, Inglaterra.
